data.label: Start: Intro to Computer Science
data.description: Understanding how computers work, memory, and basic logic.

data.label: Version Control (Git/GitHub)
data.description: Managing code changes, branching, and collaborating with others.

data.label: Programming Fundamentals
data.description: Deep dive into a core language (e.g., Python, Java, or C++).

data.label: Data Structures
data.description: Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Trees, and Graphs.

data.label: Algorithms
data.description: Sorting, searching, recursion, and Big O time/space complexity.

data.label: Object-Oriented Design
data.description: Classes, inheritance, polymorphism, and design patterns.

data.label: Relational Databases & SQL
data.description: Table design, normal forms, indexing, and writing complex queries.

data.label: APIs and Web Architecture
data.description: RESTful services, HTTP protocols, JSON, and client-server model.

data.label: Backend Frameworks
data.description: Building servers with Node.js/Express, Spring Boot, or Django.

data.label: Frontend Integration
data.description: Connecting APIs to user interfaces using React, Vue, or Angular.

data.label: Testing & QA
data.description: Unit testing, integration testing, and Test-Driven Development (TDD).

data.label: CI/CD & Deployment
data.description: Docker, GitHub Actions, and deploying to AWS, GCP, or Azure.

data.label: Capstone Project
data.description: Build and deploy a full-stack application to your portfolio.

data.label: Job Ready: Junior Software Engineer
data.description: LeetCode practice, system design basics, and mock interviews.
